items.title: Natasha Stott Despoja, Terence Tao among 'outstanding' Australians on King's Birthday Honours list

children.content: Almost 950 Australians are honoured, including five stand-out recipients who are now Companions of the Order.

gallery.altText: A professonal holding a report and looking into the distance.

items.title: SA Police investigating after man dies after 'ineffective' taser arrest

children.content: Police are investigating an incident at Clare, in South Australia's mid north, where a man became unresponsive during an arrest.

image.altText: multiple officers on the street

items.title: With his pet chihuahua and trusty gopher, 97yo grazier won't slow down

children.content: At 97, Doug Harrison still scoots around his outback station, doing as much work as he can. As he nears a century of living, he reflects on memorable moments over the decades, with a cuppa in hand and his trusty chihuahua by his side.

image.altText: a man with black sunglasses holding the steering wheel of a vehicle with a white small dog sitting next to him

items.title: Highland cows encounters bring 'positive impact', agritourism operators say

children.content: Traipsing around a farm in the wake of a highland cow or donkey might seem like a quaint rural pastime — but those in the business of agritourism believe there are other benefits.

gallery.altText: Two large shaggy cows in a green paddock. One is looking directly atthe camera, the other is grazing the grass.
A young man, his female partner and their small baby with a brown fluffy highland calf and a white calf.

thumbnail.altText: Two large shaggy cows in a green paddock. One is looking directly atthe camera, the other is grazing the grass.
A young man, his female partner and their small baby with a brown fluffy highland calf and a white calf.

items.title: Homelessness service concerned by changing demographic in clients

children.content: As cost of living and housing pressures intensify, a South Australian homelessness service says more young women and single mothers are reaching out for support.

image.altText: A person sleeping wrapped in a blanket in the middle of a grassy reserve, city streets and cars in the background

items.title: 30 years of Pokémon: The 'immersive' phenomenon still finding new fans

children.content: Three decades after the franchise that coined the phrase "Gotta catch 'em all!" was first released, parents are sharing their love of the franchise with their children.

image.altText: A man in a pokemon hat with his son with pokemon toys and photos

items.title: Lorna has lived through two world wars, two pandemics and 26 Australian prime ministers

children.content: After a couple of years as the country's oldest woman, Lorna Henstridge is still going strong.

image.altText: An elderly woman holding an oval framed photo of a young child wearing Elizabethan costume

items.title: 'Very troubled project': Hospital cost blowout concerns treasurer

children.content: The new Women's and Children's Hospital was priced at $3.2 billion in 2022, before inflation and other pressures sent costs in the construction industry soaring.

image.altText: A man in a navy suit sits on a chair inside looking at the camera with a neutral expression.

items.title: Future of iconic wine Wolf Blass unclear amid large brand overhaul

children.content: A cloud hangs over the future of the famous Barossa brand as its maker, Treasury Wine Estates, looks to cull more than half of its labels.

image.altText: a red wine label

items.title: Body-in-suitcase killer loses bid to reduce sentence for double murder

children.content: The NSW Court of Criminal Appeal dismisses a bid by Daniel Holdom to have his sentence reduced after he pleaded guilty in 2018 to murdering his girlfriend and her two-year-old daughter before dumping the child's body in a suitcase on the side of a remote highway.

image.altText: Khandalyce Kiara Pearce and Karlie Jade Pearce-Stevenson

items.title: Mother creates modest activewear to empower herself and others

children.content: Yasmin Jammoul was sick of wearing oversized men's T-shirts to the gym when she started exercising postpartum, so she created her own clothing line.

image.altText: A woman with a dark green hijab and black outfit sitting on a chair smiling.

items.title: Public servant claims threat of $4m damages bill in golf course fight

children.content: A South Australian public servant taking the state government to court over a controversial redevelopment in the Adelaide Parklands says he will continue to fight the case despite it potentially leading to him losing his house or becoming bankrupt.

image.altText: A man wearing a green shirt standing in front of a line of trees and a dirt path while holding folders

items.title: It's an AI behemoth. Now Anthropic is making a power play in Australia

children.content: The world's biggest tech titans see Australia as a promising investment opportunity for their AI ambitions, but some fear the federal government's regulatory retreat could cause more harm.

articles.title: Anthropic wants caution but the market wants more AI

children.content: Anthropic wants caution as AI intelligence surges but the stock market can't get enough.

items.title: When a detective told a witness Joanna was pregnant, she took police to VCAT

children.content: A woman who says she suffered life-changing stress and anxiety — and later, the death of one of her babies — after a Victoria Police officer unlawfully disclosed that she was pregnant wants her story known.

image.altText: A woman with brunette hair poses for a photo in a leafy setting wearing a pink top and blue scarf

items.title: Billy Slater to play peacemaker after Maroons stars' fiery club clash

children.content: Queensland coach Billy Slater jokes he might need to table a peace summit between Maroons captain Cameron Munster and fullback Kalyn Ponga as he reveals his team for State of Origin II.

image.altText: Kalyn Ponga stands alongside Cameron Munster

items.title: Tasmania's population boom has gone bust — and it spells trouble

children.content: From being a hot destination 10 years ago, Tasmania's population growth has ground to a halt — and big changes will be needed to reverse the trend, experts say.

items.title: Top neurologists say regulator ignored warnings as weed killer decision looms

children.content: Australia's leading movement disorder specialists say the chemical regulator has not engaged with their concerns about paraquat, despite growing evidence linking the herbicide to Parkinson's disease.

items.title: Victorian Premier Jacinta Allan decries sexist Melbourne billboard

children.content: Premier Jacinta Allan has been joined by Anthony Albanese, Julia Gillard and other politicians — except for Pauline Hanson — in denouncing the language used to describe her on political signs seen in the Melbourne CBD.

image.altText: A billboard saying Ditch the Witch

items.title: Indigenous families want 'crisis' investigated after 15 deaths in six months

children.content: Remote Indigenous communities across Australia are painfully aware that their life expectancy rates are worsening — and in one Northern Territory community, residents are calling for an investigation into a local death rate they feel is "not normal".

image.altText: Aboriginal senior woman and younger Aboriginal man sitting together, serious expression, in front of green leaves.

items.title: Perth actor wants police to pay after apartment 'destroyed' during murder probe

children.content: Troy Coward's investment property was the scene of a brutal murder involving his tenants in 2012. More than 13 years later, he is fighting for compensation from police over the impact he says their investigation had on his health and finances.

image.altText: Man with short hair and dark brown blazer, arms folded, with trees and pathway in background

items.title: History quiz: When was the first Mars Exploration Rover launch?

children.content: What make of car was stolen in the world's first official vehicle theft? And do you know where the Endeavour was repaired after hitting the Great Barrier Reef in 1770?

image.altText: A black and white image of a robot arm surveying the rocky, barren surface of Mars.

items.title: Secrets of Indigenous astronomy revealed in new exhibition

children.content: Newcastle Art Gallery presents the distinctive and intricate work of the Torres Strait Islander artist in its first major solo survey following a four-year refurbishment.

image.altText: A Torres Strait Islander man with a grey beard standing with his arms crossed in front of a large artwork.

items.title: From migration to AUKUS, more politicians are speaking out

children.content: Former Coalition frontbencher Paul Scarr says inflammatory migration rhetoric is taking a toll on migrant communities. His warning comes as both major parties wrestle with populist pressures.

items.title: Obscene acts charges prompt calls for more CCTV

items.title: Piastri promoted after penalty as teen sensation wins wild Monaco GP

children.content: Teenage sensation Kimi Antonelli was flawless to lead every lap of a drama-filled Monaco Grand Prix, claiming a fifth consecutive win to extend his lead in the Formula 1 drivers' championship. Follow live.

items.title: Advocates call for NDIS to reduce spending on tribunal funding fights

children.content: The agency spent $60 million on lawyers to fight participants at a tribunal last financial year. Disability advocates say there should be greater focus on the NDIS's legal fees as cuts to the scheme are being made.

items.title: Why sentiment in Japan has turned against foreigners despite a worker shortage

children.content: Japan's answer to One Nation skyrockets in popularity after adopting an anti-immigration stance, despite Japan needing foreign workers more than ever.

image.altText: Sohei Kamiya, holding two microphones tape together, speaking with a closed fist in the air.

items.title: Victorian teachers sue over alleged unpaid superannuation

children.content: A class action alleges the Education Department short-changed teachers some $100 million in superannuation contributions between 1995 and 2023.

image.altText: A woman with chin length wavy blonde hair with a two-toned orange scarf around her neck sits with patchworking on her lap.

items.title: Players left in tears as Danish star Eriksen collapses during friendly

children.content: Danish player Christian Eriksen collapses on the pitch in a match against Ukraine but is conscious, the Danish Football Association says in a social media post.

image.altText: Danish players show their distress after Christian Eriksen's collapse.

items.title: 'Cherished' Bulls player and ex-Michael Jordan teammate dies

children.content: Stacey King, who won NBA titles with the Chicago Bulls in the 1990s and was a longtime broadcaster for the team, has died.

image.altText: Stacey King playing for the Chicago Bulls in 1990.

items.title: How this Indigenous mother paved the way for her children to study medicine

children.content: Ieesha, Abdul and Jamaal Nasser are following in the footsteps of their mother Tatum Maybir, who entered medicine aged 45 after raising her six children.
